acceptanceCriteria: `wishlists` table has a `source` column of type varchar with default value `'manual'`
`wishlists` table has a unique constraint on `(userId, gameId)`
Schema test asserts `source` is present in the wishlists columns
`addToWishlistSchema` is exported and requires a `gameId` field that must be a valid UUID string
`wishlistPaginationSchema` is exported with `page` default 1 and `limit` default 24 (max 100)
Validation tests cover valid and invalid inputs for both schemas
GET / returns paginated wishlist items with game info and best price (storeName, storeLogoUrl, currentPriceCents, originalPriceCents, discountPercent, buyUrl) using `buildEnvelopeResponse`
POST / inserts a wishlist entry with source='manual', returns the entry and a `hasPriceAlert` boolean indicating whether an active price alert exists for the user+game
DELETE /:gameId deletes the wishlist entry for the authenticated user and game, returns 204 on success and 404 if not found
GET /deals returns only wishlist items where the latest price_history row has a non-null discount > 0, paginated with `buildEnvelopeResponse`
All endpoints read the authenticated user ID from `c.get('user')` context set by authMiddleware
Invalid input returns 400 with error details from Zod validation
`authMiddleware` is applied to all wishlist routes
payload.issueBody:
## Overview
Build the API for users to manage their personal game wishlist — adding, removing, and viewing games they want to track.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/user/me/wishlist` | Required | Get user's wishlist with current prices |
| `POST` | `/api/user/me/wishlist` | Required | Add a game to wishlist |
| `DELETE` | `/api/user/me/wishlist/:gameId` | Required | Remove a game from wishlist |
| `GET` | `/api/user/me/wishlist/deals` | Required | Filter wishlist to only games currently on sale |

## Response Shape
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "gameId": "uuid",
      "title": "Game Title",
      "coverImageUrl": "...",
      "addedAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "source": "manual",
      "bestPrice": {
        "storeName": "GOG",
        "storeLogoUrl": "...",
        "currentPriceCents": 999,
        "originalPriceCents": 3999,
        "discountPercent": 75,
        "buyUrl": "https://gog.com/game/...?pp=<affiliate>"
      },
      "allStorePrices": [...]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement all endpoints with JWT auth middleware
- [ ] `GET /wishlist` should join across `store_listings` to attach the current best price per game
- [ ] `GET /wishlist/deals` filters to games where at least one `store_listing.is_on_sale = true`
- [ ] When a game is added, also check if the user has no price alert for it and optionally prompt (frontend concern, but API should support it)
- [ ] Apply pagination to wishlist (`?page=1&limit=24`)
- [ ] Add unit and integration tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can add/remove games from their wishlist
- Wishlist response includes the best current price across all stores for each game
- `source` field distinguishes between manually added (`manual`) and Steam-synced (`steam_sync`) items

## Dependencies
- #15 User Authentication
- #13 Core Game & Deals REST API
